summary.intent: Implement CrmService for the live store in the moltis Rust gateway (CHA-13), including the service trait, LiveCrmService implementation, gateway wiring, RPC method registration, and integration tests.
summary.outcome: Full CrmService implementation completed: trait + NoopCrmService added to service-traits, LiveCrmService wrapping SqliteCrmStore created, wired into GatewayServices and prepare_gateway, 15 crm.* RPC methods registered, methods added to READ_METHODS/WRITE_METHODS arrays. All tests pass and clippy is clean.

repo: ServiceResult is Result<Value, ServiceError> — error type is ServiceError::message(), NOT ErrorShape
GatewayServices uses a builder pattern with with_*() methods; to_services() clones all Arc<dyn Trait> into the Services bundle used by GraphQL
Services struct in service-traits and GatewayServices in gateway/src/services.rs are separate and both need crm field added
Feature gating uses #[cfg(feature = "crm")] blocks; the crm feature is already a default feature in gateway/Cargo.toml
CrmConfig.enabled is checked at wire-up time in prepare_gateway, not per-request
PII fields (email, phone) are Secret<String> in domain types; exposed via ExposeSecret at the service boundary when serializing to JSON
The moltis-web crate has a pre-existing CSS compile error unrelated to Rust workspace compilation — exclude it with --exclude moltis-web
READ_METHODS and WRITE_METHODS are const arrays in methods/mod.rs that control auth scoping for RPC methods
RPC methods follow crm.{entity}.{action} namespace convention, registered in methods/services.rs after existing cron.* entries
Stokowski orchestrator may send the same lifecycle prompt multiple times (retries on API 500/529 errors) — the agent must be idempotent

code.finding: ServiceResult = Result<Value, ServiceError>; ServiceError::message(string) is the constructor for errors
GatewayServices has noop(), with_*() builders, and to_services() that maps to the service-traits Services bundle
CRM read methods inserted after 'cron.runs' entry
CRM write methods inserted after 'cron.run' entry
Had a clippy warning that needed fixing — unrelated to CRM but caught by the quality gate run

workflow: Read all relevant files before writing any code — the error type mismatch (ErrorShape vs ServiceError) was caught by reading service-traits before writing crm_service.rs
Arc is already imported at the top of server.rs — redundant local use inside cfg blocks causes clippy warnings
Run cargo check first, then tests, then clippy — check catches compile errors faster than clippy
The autonomous agent pattern requires checking for pre-existing branch/PR before creating new ones to avoid duplicates on rework runs

friction: Anthropic API returned HTTP 500 internal server errors and 529 overloaded errors repeatedly during the investigation stage, causing Stokowski to retry the same prompt 8+ times before succeeding
LINEAR_API_KEY env var was not inherited by bash subprocess spawned from the agent, requiring workarounds to post Linear comments
ServiceResult error type was initially wrong (used ErrorShape instead of ServiceError), requiring a full rewrite of crm_service.rs
Context window exhausted mid-implementation (during methods/mod.rs edit), requiring session continuation from summary
moltis-web pre-existing CSS compile error means --exclude moltis-web must be used for all cargo commands
open_items: REST endpoints /api/crm/... deferred — investigation noted these should be added later per CLAUDE.md convention
list_interactions currently requires either contactId or matterId param — no global interaction listing endpoint
Config validation: CrmConfig presence in build_schema_map() and check_semantic_warnings() was noted as a risk but not verified
PR creation and Linear workpad update were the final steps at context cutoff — unclear if these completed successfully
